methods.description: A comprehensive procedure for extracting pollen from bat guano deposits in organic and detrital matrices, including chemical and sieving treatments to separate pollen grains from the matrix.

steps.description: Process guano samples using chemical and sieving treatments to separate pollen grains.
steps.searchable_summary: apply chemical and sieving treatments to guano samples to extract pollen

steps.description: Compare results of samples processed with and without sieving to validate the method.
steps.searchable_summary: compare processed samples with and without sieving to validate extraction method

methods.description: Validation of the pollen extraction method by comparing samples processed with and without sieving, demonstrating the effectiveness of the sieving step in producing cleaner and more concentrated pollen preparations.

steps.description: Process guano samples from the same bat cave without the sieving procedure and compare with samples processed using the described procedure.
steps.searchable_summary: process and compare guano samples with and without sieving
inputs: guano samples from the same bat cave

steps.description: Analyze the final residues and mounted slides to assess the separation of pollen grains.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze residues and slides to assess pollen separation
